Marina Living is perfectly suited to young professionals, couples and retirees. The well-developed infrastructure allows you to find everything you may need without leaving the community. Residents have access to one of the best beaches in Dubai with central attractions within walking distance.
Within the community, there is a large shopping mall, as well as a variety of supermarkets and entertainment organizations. There are nurseries located in the area, and schools and hospitals in the neighboring communities within a 10-to-15-minute drive.
Landmark Sabbour Development, known as LMD, is a real estate developer founded in Egypt in 2007. Its headquarters remain in Cairo, and the company expanded internationally in 2011 with the launch of Continental Investments Company in the UAE. Marina Living is located within walking distance of the canal and offers different types of apartments.
